'''hahosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fobbit|fobbit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fobbit|fobbit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hahosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæhesheth|hæhesheth]] || [[word:hæheshej|hæheshej]] || [[word:hæheshesh|hæheshesh]] || [[word:hæheshe|hæheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hahohoshoth|hahohoshoth]] || [[word:hahohoshoj|hahohoshoj]] || [[word:hahohoshosh|hahohoshosh]] || [[word:hahohosho|hahohosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hahoshoth|hahoshoth]] || [[word:hahoshoj|hahoshoj]] || [[word:hahoshosh|hahoshosh]] || [[word:hahosho|hahosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hahofshoth|hahofshoth]] || [[word:hahofshoj|hahofshoj]] || [[word:hahofshosh|hahofshosh]] || [[word:hahofshof|hahofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hahoshotho|hahoshotho]] || [[word:hahoshojo|hahoshojo]] || [[word:hahoshosho|hahoshosho]] || [[word:hahoshoko|hahoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hahoshoth|hahoshoth]] || [[word:hahoshoj|hahoshoj]] || [[word:hahoshosh|hahoshosh]] || [[word:hahosho|hahosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hahoshothol|hahoshothol]] || [[word:hahoshojol|hahoshojol]] || [[word:hahoshoshol|hahoshoshol]] || [[word:hahoshokol|hahoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hahoshothotho|hahoshothotho]] || [[word:hahoshojojo|hahoshojojo]] || [[word:hahoshoshosho|hahoshoshosho]] || [[word:hahoshoko|hahoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hahoshothon|hahoshothon]] || [[word:hahoshojon|hahoshojon]] || [[word:hahoshoshon|hahoshoshon]] || [[word:hahoshokon|hahoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hahoshothoro|hahoshothoro]] || [[word:hahoshojoro|hahoshojoro]] || [[word:hahoshoshoro|hahoshoshoro]] || [[word:hahoshokoro|hahoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
